titleStmt.title: SII 19.63: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 63. (A.R. No. 549 of 1921.) PUḶḶAMAṄGAI NEAR PAŚUPATIKŌYIL, PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The details of the date given in the inscription correspond to A.D. 973, March 13, in the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa. The record states that the mahāsabhā of Puḷḷamaṅgalam a brahmadēya village in Kiḻār-kūṟṟam, which met together after beat of drum in the court-yard in front of the temple of Tiruvālandurai, sold tax-free a land 1(1/2) mā in extent, situated in Kaṇḍamaṅgalam (another brahmadēya village) to the temple of Kāḷāpiḍāri in the centre of their village, for 25 Īḻakkāśu received from the karaṇattār of that locality. This land is stated to have been confiscated out of the 3 mā belonging as kāvidikkāṇi to Tiruveṇkāṭṭaḍigaḷ alias Eḻunūṟṟaimbattunālvaṉ the madhyastha of the village and his brothers, as the former failed to render account for the money and paddy left in his charge for disbursement to certain Veḷḷāḷas and Brāhmaṇas.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉma
ṟki yāṇṭu 2 Āvatiṉ Etirāmā
ṇṭu kiḻāṟkūṟṟattu brahmadeya
m puḷḷamaṅkalattu mahāsabhai
yom Ivvāṇṭu miṉanāyaṟṟu
c cevvāykkiḻamai peṟṟa Aviṭṭa
ttiṉāṉṟu paṟaiyaṟaintu tiruvā
lantuṟai muṉpilvācal māṭa
tte kūṭiyiruntu sabhaiyom
viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam vilaiyā
vaṇam Ivvūr naṭuviṟceri tiruma
ṇimaṇṭakamuṭaiya kāḷāpiṭā[ rikku] nā
ṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvū
r brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭamaṅkala
ttu nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟke
llai vaṭukaṉvāykku meṟkkum kaṇṇāṟṟu
kku vaṭakkum Āritaṉ kovaṉ paṟpanāpaṉ
nilattukku kiḻakkum paṟpanā
pa nilattukkum kāppiyaṉ cerntaṉ mā
teva ṉilattukku teṟku
Immūṉṟu māvil Ivvūr madhyasta
tiruveṇkāṭṭaṭikaḷāṉa 7 100 5 10 4vaṉu
m tampimārum kāvitikkāṇiyāl piṟantuṭai
ya Immūṉṟu māvile mma4 ceyyum Ip
piṭāriyārkku viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu I
v veḻunūṟṟaimpattunālvaṉ Itaṉ muṉ
ṉai Ivvūrkkaṇakkuc ceyvān cun
taracoḻamuttaraiyarāna pirāntakamuttaraiyarkku
ṟṟukkala nellu Ivvūr mel
ṭuttuvarum ṉellil Āyirattirunūṟṟa
mpatin kala nellukku sabhai
yom paṇittu kkuṭuttava
raiyum maṟṟum Ūril veḷḷā
ḷaraiyum brāhmaṇaraiyuṅ
kkāṭṭi Iṭuvicca kācum paya
ṟum Ippayaṟum nellum
kācum mutale kilavu kāṭṭu
kaveṉṟu n=taṉṉai Aḻaippittu
c cellakkāṭṭa tāṉ vantu ka
ṇakkuk kāṭṭāviṭṭa kuṟṟattā
lum nampimārmuṉ ṉiṉṟu
paṇiceyya viṭṭa kuṟṟattā
lum taṅkaḷ 3 10 4 cceyyum
2 10 5 Īḻakkācukku kiḻu miṟaiyī
li Ātaṉmaiyil melu miṟai
yiliāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom ma
hāsabhaiyom Iṉṉila
ttukku Ituve Āvaṇamum
poruḷmāvaṟitip poruḷccila
volaiyu mituve Āka natuviṟcce
ri karaṇattāriṭai Ivvirupattañcu
kācuṅ koṇṭu Ivvorumā
varaic ceyyum viṟṟukku
ṭuttom bhiṭāriyārkku mahāsabhai
yom paṇiyāl madhyastaṉ kki
ntāyaṉāṉa 7 100vaṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ kālāyaṉ
vaṭukan tāyaṉeṉ Ippaṭi ya
ṟive nāritaṉ patpanābhaṉ ma
Ippaṭi A
ṟiveṉ vā
rakkiyaṉ pā
ṇṭaṉ ke
cuvaṉeṉ
Ippaṭi A
ṟiveṉ kā
ppiyaṉ
cerntaṉ
comaṉeṉ
Ippaṭi A
ṟiveṉ cāvā
nti nārāya
ṇaṉ māṟa
ṉeṉ Ip
paṭi Aṟive
ṉ cāvān
tibhaṭṭaṉ śrī
dharaṉ tat
taṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 19.63 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
